title: As an admin, I want to manage products so that I can add, update, and remove items from the catalogue

acceptance_criteria.given: an admin submits the add product form with all required fields
acceptance_criteria.then: the product is created and appears in the catalogue immediately

acceptance_criteria.given: an admin updates a product price
acceptance_criteria.then: the new price appears in the catalogue and on the product detail page within 5 seconds

acceptance_criteria.given: an admin attempts to delete a product that has pending orders
acceptance_criteria.then: the deletion is blocked with: This product has pending orders and cannot be deleted. Archive it instead.

acceptance_criteria.given: a non-admin user attempts to access admin product endpoints
acceptance_criteria.then: they receive a 403 Forbidden response regardless of authentication status

acceptance_criteria.given: an admin uploads a product image larger than 5MB or not an image format
acceptance_criteria.then: the upload is rejected with a clear error message before any server processing occurs

non_functional_requirements.performance: Admin product list loads in under 1 second with up to 1000 products
non_functional_requirements.security: Admin role verified server-side on every request. File upload validated for type and size before storage.
non_functional_requirements.accessibility: Admin forms follow same accessibility standards as public forms

definition_of_done: Authorisation bypass test: non-admin JWT rejected at every admin endpoint
File upload validation: oversized and invalid type both rejected
